---
title: "Schedule"
editor: visual
---

Below is the planned schedule. Dates, topics, and assignments may adjust as needed.

**Class Format:** Class meets Mondays 3:30–4:45 PM in 2439 TNRB. Each class is run as a practice: short whistle segments (film review, chalk talk) followed by live drill time building with Claude Code. Most of your work happens between practices; class time is where we install skills and review film.

**Note:** Fall classes begin Wed, Sep 2, but Labor Day (Sep 7) means our first in-person practice is Mon, Sep 14. Week of Sep 2 is an online setup week. We DO meet Mon, Nov 23 (Thanksgiving break begins Wed, Nov 25). Last day of class is Thu, Dec 10.

| Practice | Date | Emphasis (Chalk Talk) | Drill (Live Build) | Assessments |
|----|------|----------------------|--------------------|-------------|
| 0 | Week of Sep 2 (online) | Course overview, what is PM in the AI era | Claude Code setup, terminal basics, first deploy | Setup checklist |
| 1 | Mon, Sep 14 | The practice model, PM history, AI disruption | Git fundamentals, company repo from template, CLAUDE.md | [Q1: Ch 1](01-pm-ai-era.qmd) |
| 2 | Mon, Sep 21 | Problems worth solving, you as the customer | Frontend fundamentals (HTML/CSS), deployment | [Q2: Ch 2](02-problems-worth-solving.qmd), [Sprint 1 Assigned](00-assessments.qmd#sprint-1-ship-showcase) |
| 3 | Mon, Sep 28 | Problem discovery, Jobs-to-be-Done, Mom Test | React basics, CC: slash commands | [Q3: Ch 3](03-problem-discovery.qmd), **Sprint 1 Due**, [Sprint 2 Assigned](00-assessments.qmd#sprint-2-validate-commit) |
| 4 | Mon, Oct 5 | Evaluating opportunities, committing to a problem | Client-side state, forms, CC: agents | [Q4: Ch 4](04-validating-opportunities.qmd) |
| 5 | Mon, Oct 12 | MVP scoping, user stories, PRDs (AI-assisted) | Supabase setup + auth | [Q5: Ch 5](05-building-your-mvp.qmd), **Sprint 2 Due**, [Sprint 3 Assigned](00-assessments.qmd#sprint-3-product-mvp) |
| 6 | Mon, Oct 19 | Usability testing, iteration | Supabase database, CRUD, RLS | [Q6: Ch 6](06-testing-with-users.qmd) |
| 7 | Mon, Oct 26 | Platform strategy, web vs mobile | APIs & integrations, CC: hooks and skills | [Q7: Ch 7](07-platform-strategy.qmd), [Mid-Semester Survey Due](00-assessments.qmd#mid-semester-feedback-survey) |
| 8 | Mon, Nov 2 | Product metrics, leading vs lagging indicators | Analytics setup, event tracking | [Q8: Ch 8](08-measuring-what-matters.qmd), **Sprint 3 Due**, [Peer Code Review Assigned](00-assessments.qmd#peer-code-review) |
| 9 | Mon, Nov 9 | Go-to-market strategy, distribution channels | Landing pages, SEO basics | [Q9: Ch 9](09-go-to-market.qmd), [Peer Code Review Due](00-assessments.qmd#peer-code-review), [Sprint 4 Assigned](00-assessments.qmd#sprint-4-progress-check) |
| 10 | Mon, Nov 16 | Business models, pricing strategy | Build & feedback | [Q10: Ch 10](10-business-models.qmd) |
| 11 | Mon, Nov 23 | Scrimmage: build & feedback | Build & feedback | **Sprint 4 Due**, [Sprint 5 Assigned](00-assessments.qmd#sprint-5-progress-check). Withdraw deadline is Tue, Nov 24. |
| 12 | Mon, Nov 30 | Scrimmage: build & feedback | Build & feedback | **Sprint 5 Due**, [Peer Product Testing Assigned](00-assessments.qmd#peer-product-testing) |
| 13 | Mon, Dec 7 | Storytelling & pitch, course retrospective | Video prep, polish | [Peer Product Testing Due](00-assessments.qmd#peer-product-testing) |
| – | Thu, Dec 10 | Last day of class (no meeting) | | [Final Project Due](00-assessments.qmd#final-project) |

## Course Phases

| Practices | Phase | Focus |
|-----------|-------|-------|
| 0–3 | Problems Worth Solving | Setup, explore problems, build throwaway prototypes |
| 4–5 | Prototype & Validate | Commit to a problem, start the real MVP |
| 6–8 | Product MVP | Build core feature, user testing, metrics |
| 9–10 | Measure & Market | GTM, business models |
| 11–12 | Build & Polish | Self-managed sprints, peer testing, dedicated build time |
| 13 | Wrap Up | Final videos, course retrospective |

## Scrimmages

Practices 11 and 12 are **scrimmages**: dedicated in-class sessions where you demo your product to a small group of peers, give and get feedback, and build on what you hear. A scrimmage is a working session, not a formal presentation:

1. In small groups, each person gives a 3-minute live demo of their real, deployed product.
2. The group responds: what worked, what confused them, what they would try next.
3. You spend the rest of the session building on the most useful feedback, with your group nearby to react.

Scrimmages exist because the first half of the course is mostly solo work. They are your standing chance to see what classmates are building, borrow ideas, and get fresh eyes on your product before the final. Bring something that runs.

## Sprints

| Sprint | Assigned | Due | Focus | Key Deliverables |
|--------|----------|-----|-------|------------------|
| 1 | Mon, Sep 21 | Mon, Sep 28 | Ship & Showcase | Portfolio live, 1 prototype, 5 problems |
| 2 | Mon, Sep 28 | Mon, Oct 12 | Validate & Commit | Worksheet, AI interview, customer interview, ICP |
| 3 | Mon, Oct 12 | Mon, Nov 2 | Product MVP | Spec docs, core feature, 3 user tests |
| 4 | Mon, Nov 9 | Mon, Nov 23 | Progress Check | Self-managed, 5-min Loom video |
| 5 | Mon, Nov 23 | Mon, Nov 30 | Progress Check | Self-managed, 5-min Loom video |
| Final | – | Thu, Dec 10 | Final Product | 5-min Loom video, product deployed |

## Peer Assignments

| Assignment | Due | Focus |
|------------|-----|-------|
| [Peer Code Review](00-assessments.qmd#peer-code-review) | Mon, Nov 9 | AI-assisted analysis of peer's codebase |
| [Peer Product Testing](00-assessments.qmd#peer-product-testing) | Mon, Dec 7 | Be a real test user for peer's app |

## Readings

Each chapter integrates PM/Strategy content with hands-on Build content. Read the assigned chapter before the quiz date.

| Chapter | Title | Quiz Date |
|---------|-------|-----------|
| 1 | [Product Management in the AI Era](01-pm-ai-era.qmd) | Mon, Sep 14 |
| 2 | [Problems Worth Solving](02-problems-worth-solving.qmd) | Mon, Sep 21 |
| 3 | [Problem Discovery](03-problem-discovery.qmd) | Mon, Sep 28 |
| 4 | [Validating Opportunities](04-validating-opportunities.qmd) | Mon, Oct 5 |
| 5 | [Building Your MVP](05-building-your-mvp.qmd) | Mon, Oct 12 |
| 6 | [Testing with Users](06-testing-with-users.qmd) | Mon, Oct 19 |
| 7 | [Platform Strategy](07-platform-strategy.qmd) | Mon, Oct 26 |
| 8 | [Measuring What Matters](08-measuring-what-matters.qmd) | Mon, Nov 2 |
| 9 | [Go-to-Market](09-go-to-market.qmd) | Mon, Nov 9 |
| 10 | [Business Models](10-business-models.qmd) | Mon, Nov 16 |
| 11 | [Sustainable Code](11-sustainable-code.qmd) | – |
| 12 | [Final Presentations](12-final-presentations.qmd) | – |
